description_long: This house is a multi-level residential structure set on a sloped terrain, featuring a combination of stone and light-colored siding on its exterior walls. The roof is predominantly gabled with multiple intersecting sections, providing a dynamic and layered appearance. Large windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with a prominent set of picture windows facing what appears to be the rear, maximizing natural light and views. The house includes a raised deck supported by columns, accessible via a staircase, and a covered entryway with steps leading up to the main door. The foundation is partially exposed due to the sloping ground, and there is a garage structure attached to one side. The overall design blends modern and craftsman elements, with clean lines and practical outdoor spaces.
description: A multi-level house with gabled roofs, stone and light siding, large windows, a raised deck, and a garage, set on a sloped terrain. The design features modern and craftsman influences with practical outdoor spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, garage, and layered gabled roofs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the stone siding, garage, and a portion of the sloped foundation.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the large picture windows, raised deck with supporting columns, and staircase.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the deck, stairs, and additional roof sections.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Covered entryway with steps, simple door, and modest overhang
